The Talos Principle

Navigate through ancient ruins solving intricate puzzles to collect Sigils. Use tools like Jammers to disable turrets, Connectors to create energy beams, and Boxes to reach elevated areas. Each puzzle requires strategic placement of limited tools to unlock gates and progress. Collect all Sigils to complete your journey through the ruins.

Arrow Keys: Move and turn | Space: Interact/Place tools | Z: Drop tool | Shift: Sprint | Enter: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
